programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences. Starring Cate Blanchett, Rooney Mara, Sarah Paulson.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: A difficult visit from her mother propels Sloane further toward Will; Richard attempts to appease Sloanes desire in a different, ill-fated way.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Maggie summons the courage to tell her parents and the police about the relationship with her high school teacher.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Blood begins to spill soon after the daughter (Allie MacDonald) of a Broadway diva wins the lead in the summer showcase at a performing-arts camp. Starring Allie MacDonald, Douglas Smith, Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: A man (James Spader) and wife who get thrills from car accidents hook up with the head (Elias Koteas) of a group that stages famous wrecks. Starring James Spader, Holly Hunter, Elias Koteas.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: An entrepreneur and his family begin to unravel after moving into an old country manor in England in the 1980s. Starring Jude Law, Carrie Coon, Oona Roche.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: With no sanctuary in sight, Helen and Will find themselves living suburban lives that neither of them recognize.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The exodus from Hollow Earth begins and time is of the essence as the sanctuary stands between the abnormal refuges and the demanding UN; as they try to maintain peace, Helen receives a surprising warning from an unexpected source.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sharkboy and Lavagirl
programme.desc: A 10-year-old (Cayden Boyd) and his imaginary friends (Taylor Lautner, Taylor Dooley) try to save a distant planet from the forces of darkness. Starring Taylor Lautner, Taylor Dooley, Cayden Boyd.

programme.title: Monster Zone
programme.desc: Transferred to a boarding school, a 15-year-old accidentally opens a portal that unleashes monsters from another dimension. Starring Jamie Bell, Jayssolitt, Ruby Rose.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss Horton Hears a Who!
programme.desc: Horton the elephants friends and neighbors think he has gone crazy when he claims that a tiny community lives on a speck of dust. Starring Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Amy Poehler.

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog
programme.desc: A magical animal rescuer gives young Emily a little red puppy that quickly grows into a 10-foot hound. With her single mother away on business, Emily and her fun but impulsive uncle set out on an adventure that takes a bite out of the Big Apple. Starring Darby Camp, Jack Whitehall, Tony Hale.

programme.title: Ella Enchanted
programme.desc: A young woman (Anne Hathaway) embarks on a journey to break the curse of obedience placed upon her by a fairy godmother. Starring Anne Hathaway, Hugh Dancy, Cary Elwes.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: An Italian-American widow (Cher), engaged to a reticent suitor, falls in love with his brother (Nicolas Cage). Starring Cher, Nicolas Cage, Vincent Gardenia.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer. Starring Meryl Streep, Hugh Grant, Simon Helberg.

programme.title: The Age of Adaline
programme.desc: A woman who has miraculously remained young for nearly 80 years meets a charismatic philanthropist who reawakens her passion for life and romance. Starring Blake Lively, Michiel Huisman, Kathy Baker.

programme.title: Frances Ha
programme.desc: Frances (Greta Gerwig) goes from apartment to apartment in Brooklyn as she looks for a job and a stable partner. Starring Greta Gerwig, Mickey Sumner, Michael Zegen.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Jumping back in time, Gia struggles to write her book about sex in America; embarking on a love story of her own, Gia processes the pain of her own losses; she moves to Indiana and bonds with Lina.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina, Sloane, and Maggie connect with their hearts desire, unaware of the fallout that awaits them.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other mans private affairs. Starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Melanie Laurent, Isabella Rossellini.

programme.title: Hyena Road
programme.desc: During the war in Afghanistan, an intelligence officer (Paul Gross) enlists a sniper (Rossif Sutherland) to track down a legendary freedom fighter. Starring Rossif Sutherland, Paul Gross, Christine Horne.

programme.title: Fugitive Pieces
programme.desc: A writer (Stephen Dillane) has trouble moving past his haunting memories of the Holocaust. Starring Stephen Dillane, Rade Serbedzija, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: In order to prevent him from altering or destroying the future, Magnus uses Adam Worths time portal to pursue him to 1898 London.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: As Hollow Earth Abnormals continue to arrive at the surface in droves, Will, Henry, Kate and Bigfoot scramble to prevent war with the Lotus Security Forces; they worry about the whereabouts and safety of Magnus who was last seen heading to Praxis.

programme.title: Santa Claus: The Movie
programme.desc: Santa (David Huddleston) and an elf (Dudley Moore) foil a New York toy manufacturers (John Lithgow) scheme to get rich off Christmas. Starring Dudley Moore, David Huddleston, John Lithgow.

programme.title: Dolphin Tale
programme.desc: A marine biologist (Harry Connick Jr.), a prosthetics designer (Morgan Freeman) and a boy band together to save the life of a dolphin whose tail was severely damaged in a trap. Starring Harry Connick, Ashley Judd, Nathan Gamble.

programme.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
programme.desc: After three nefarious farmers declare war on them, a sly fox (George Clooney) rallies his animal neighbors to fight back. Starring George Clooney, Meryl Streep, Jason Schwartzman.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: American boy Dre Parkers fighting skills are no match for Cheng, the school bully. He finds a friend in Mr. Han, a maintenance man who is also a martial-arts master. Mr. Han teaches Dre kung fu in the hope that Dre will be able to face down Cheng. Starring Jaden Smith, Jackie Chan, Taraji P. Henson.

programme.title: Night at the Museum
programme.desc: A night watchman (Ben Stiller) at a museum of natural history discovers that exhibits come alive after the building closes. Starring Ben Stiller, Carla Gugino, Dick Van Dyke.

programme.title: Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: In 2029 an astronaut (Mark Wahlberg) leads a human uprising against a military leader (Tim Roth) and his army of ruling simians. Starring Mark Wahlberg, Tim Roth, Helena Bonham Carter.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Storm-chasers (Helen Hunt, Bill Paxton) finalizing their divorce try to place equipment inside a tornado on the Oklahoma plains. Starring Helen Hunt, Bill Paxton, Cary Elwes.

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: A post-apocalyptic ice age forces humanitys last survivors aboard a globe-spanning supertrain. One man (Chris Evans) will risk everything to lead a revolt for control of the engine and the future of the world. Starring Chris Evans, Song Kang-ho, Tilda Swinton.

programme.title: Catwoman
programme.desc: Patience Philips works as a graphic designer for Hedare Beauty, a cosmetics company on the verge of releasing an anti-aging product. When she inadvertently happens upon a secret her employer is hiding, she finds herself in the middle of a conspiracy. Starring Halle Berry, Benjamin Bratt, Sharon Stone.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: In Indiana, Gia and Linas bond is threatened by the sudden arrival of Jack and the telling of a long-held truth.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Maggie must come to terms with unimaginable loss as Aaron Knodel is put on trial.

programme.title: The White Fortress
programme.desc: When a chance encounter brings together two teens from opposite sides of life in post-war Sarajevo, a blossoming romance conceals their desperate and disturbing motives. Starring Pavle Cemerikic, Sumeja Dardagan, Jasmin Geljo.

programme.title: Debug
programme.desc: While working on a derelict freighter in outer space, six young hackers fall prey to the ships artificial intelligence, a program that would kill to become human. Starring Jeananne Goossen, Adrian Holmes, Jason Momoa.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: With a government inspector threatening to cut off the Sanctuarys funding, Magnus and Will must explain a failed mission.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus flies to Africa to meet Sanctuarys secret financial advisor but ends up in a deadly hostage situation.

programme.title: My Little Pony: The Movie
programme.desc: Twilight Sparkle, Applejack, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Fluttershy and Rarity embark on an epic journey to save Ponyville from a dark force. Starring Emily Blunt, Kristin Chenoweth, Liev Schreiber.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the towns full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: Independence Day
programme.desc: When alien invaders lay waste to planet Earth, its up to a select group of survivors to make a last-ditch stand. Fighting superior technology, mankinds best weapon is the will to survive. Starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum.

programme.title: The Iron Giant
programme.desc: A malevolent government agent threatens to destroy the friendship between a boy and a huge alien robot. Starring Jennifer Aniston, Eli Marienthal, Harry Connick.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: Starman
programme.desc: A Wisconsin widow (Karen Allen) falls in love with an alien (Jeff Bridges) who has remade himself as a double of her husband. Starring Jeff Bridges, Karen Allen, Charles Martin Smith.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Days
programme.desc: Victorian Phileas Fogg (David Niven) bets members of his London club that he and his valet, Passepartout (Cantinflas), can circle the globe in 80 days. Starring David Niven, Mario Moreno Cantinflas, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: A Passage to India
programme.desc: Adela Quested (Judy Davis) and Mrs. Moore (Peggy Ashcroft) tour 1920s India with a native doctor (Victor Banerjee). Starring Judy Davis, Peggy Ashcroft, Victor Banerjee.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: Plotters kidnap a U.S. couples (James Stewart, Doris Day) son to hide an assassination at Royal Albert Hall. Starring James Stewart, Doris Day, Bernard Miles.

programme.title: A Little Romance
programme.desc: A worldly Parisian (Laurence Olivier) tells two teenage lovers (Diane Lane, Thelonious Bernard) to kiss at dusk under the Bridge of Sighs in Venice. Starring Laurence Olivier, Diane Lane, Thelonious Bernard.

programme.title: Juarez
programme.desc: President Benito Pablo Juarez (Paul Muni) rids Mexico of Napoleon IIIs puppets, Emperor Maximilian (Brian Aherne) and wife (Bette Davis). Starring Paul Muni, Bette Davis, Brian Aherne.

programme.title: Fiesta
programme.desc: A Mexican girl (Esther Williams) poses as her bull-shy twin brother (Ricardo Montalban) in the ring to please their matador father. Starring Esther Williams, Akim Tamiroff, Ricardo Montalban.

programme.title: The Champ
programme.desc: A has-been boxer (Wallace Beery) trains in Tijuana for a comeback to impress his son (Jackie Cooper). Starring Wallace Beery, Jackie Cooper, Irene Rich.

programme.title: The Brave One
programme.desc: A Mexican boy (Michel Ray) seeks a presidential pardon for his pet bull, sold to face a matador in the bullring. Starring Michel Ray, Rodolfo Hoyos, Narciso Busquets.

programme.title: Cowboy
programme.desc: A Chicago hotel desk clerk (Jack Lemmon) talks a trail boss (Glenn Ford) into taking him on a cattle drive to Mexico. Starring Glenn Ford, Jack Lemmon, Anna Kashfi.

programme.title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
programme.desc: Three unlucky Americans (Humphrey Bogart, Walter Huston, Tim Holt) seek gold in Mexico, agreeing beforehand to split it equally. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Walter Huston, Tim Holt.

programme.title: The Night of the Iguana
programme.desc: In Mexico, a defrocked clergyman (Richard Burton) juggles relationships with three women of disparate personalities. Starring Richard Burton, Ava Gardner, Deborah Kerr.

programme.title: The Best Years of Our Lives
programme.desc: A disabled serviceman and two other veterans (Fredric March, Dana Andrews) have difficulty adjusting to civilian life after World War II. Starring Fredric March, Myrna Loy, Dana Andrews.

programme.title: Sweet Bird of Youth
programme.desc: Florida gigolo Chance Wayne (Paul Newman) brings home ex-screen queen Alexandra Del Lago (Geraldine Page). Starring Paul Newman, Geraldine Page, Ed Begley.

programme.title: Diner
programme.desc: Immature buddies (Steve Guttenberg, Mickey Rourke, Kevin Bacon) regroup at an all-night diner after various escapades in late-1950s Baltimore. Starring Steve Guttenberg, Mickey Rourke, Kevin Bacon.

programme.title: Some Came Running
programme.desc: An ex-GI writer (Frank Sinatra) hangs out with a gambler (Dean Martin) and a floozy (Shirley MacLaine) in his hometown. Starring Frank Sinatra, Dean Martin, Shirley MacLaine.

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: An ambulance driver and a nurse share an ill-fated romance in World War I Italy. Based on Ernest Hemingways novel. Starring Helen Hayes, Gary Cooper, Adolphe Menjou.

programme.title: Of Mice and Men
programme.desc: Based on John Steinbecks novel about the relationship between a migrant worker and his slow-witted friend. Starring Burgess Meredith, Lon Chaney, Betty Field.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Cities
programme.desc: Dickens Madame Defarge knits, the Bastille falls, and a London lawyer (Ronald Colman) makes a great sacrifice for love. Starring Ronald Colman, Elizabeth Allan, Edna May Oliver.

programme.title: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Dickens orphan Pip (John Mills) goes to London to become a gentleman, thanks to his anonymous benefactor. Starring John Mills, Valerie Hobson, Bernard Miles.

programme.title: Tom Jones
programme.desc: Henry Fieldings lusty foundling hero (Albert Finney) meets a series of attractive women in 18th-century England. Starring Albert Finney, Susannah York, Hugh Griffith.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: A womans unquenchable thirst for romance ultimately proves to be her undoing. Based on Gustave Flauberts novel. Starring Jennifer Jones, Van Heflin, Louis Jourdan.

programme.title: The Picture of Dorian Gray
programme.desc: Corrupted by a lord (George Sanders), Oscar Wildes London aristocrat (Hurd Hatfield) stays young, but his portrait begins to age. Starring George Sanders, Hurd Hatfield, Angela Lansbury.

programme.title: Mr. Smith Goes to Washington
programme.desc: A country bumpkin faces ridicule and corruption when he takes his idealistic views to the nations capital. Starring James Stewart, Jean Arthur, Claude Rains.

programme.title: The Great McGinty
programme.desc: A dimwitted drifter finds his values changing after he is manipulated into becoming a successful public official. Starring Brian Donlevy, Muriel Angelus, Akim Tamiroff.

programme.title: Seven Days in May
programme.desc: An aide (Kirk Douglas) discovers his generals (Burt Lancaster) Pentagon plot and tells the president (Fredric March). Starring Burt Lancaster, Kirk Douglas, Fredric March.

programme.title: Youre in the Army Now
programme.desc: Two vacuum-cleaner salesmen (Jimmy Durante, Phil Silvers) call on an Army recruiter and wind up enlisted. Starring Jimmy Durante, Jane Wyman, Phil Silvers.

programme.title: The Candidate
programme.desc: An image maker (Peter Boyle) grooms the son (Robert Redford) of a political boss (Melvyn Douglas) for a token bid in a U.S. Senate race. Starring Robert Redford, Peter Boyle, Melvyn Douglas.

programme.title: Immortal Love
programme.desc: A woman marries an impaired man against her will and problems soon develop when her estranged lover returns. Starring Hideko Takamine, Keiji Sada, Nobuko Otowa.

programme.title: Yojimbo
programme.desc: A free-lance samurai (Toshirô Mifune) works both sides of the street in a village split by warring merchants. Starring Toshiro Mifune, Tatsuya Nakadai, Eijiro Tono.

programme.title: Autumn Sonata
programme.desc: A Norwegian pastors plain wife (Liv Ullmann) resents her visiting mother (Ingrid Bergman), a famous concert pianist. Starring Ingrid Bergman, Liv Ullmann, Lena Nyman.

programme.title: Bicycle Thieves
programme.desc: A poor man (Lamberto Maggiorani) and his son (Enzo Staiola) search postwar Rome for the stolen bicycle he needs to work as a bill poster. Starring Lamberto Maggiorani, Lianella Carell, Enzo Staiola.

programme.title: I vitelloni
programme.desc: In a small Italian town, five adolescents have varying degrees of success coping with the problems of growing up. Starring Franco Interlenghi, Alberto Sordi, Franco Fabrizi.

programme.title: The Umbrellas of Cherbourg
programme.desc: A pregnant French girl (Catherine Deneuve) must choose between her lover (Nino Castelnuovo), who is going into the service, and a very wealthy merchant; all dialogue is sung. Starring Catherine Deneuve, Nino Castelnuovo, Anne Vernon.

programme.desc: When a young woman on the run is forced to hide out at a smart home, she becomes terrorized by ROMI, its sinister digital assistant. Starring Alexa Barajas, Jocelyn Chugg, Juan Riedinger.

programme.title: T.I.M.
programme.desc: Prosthetics engineer Abi works on her companys latest product, an AI humanoid called T.I.M. thats designed to serve man; things soon take a turn for the worse when T.I.M. starts to develop a dangerous obsession with her. Starring Georgina Campbell, Eamon Farren, Mark Rowley.

programme.title: The Last Thing She Said
programme.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the womans awkward, middle-aged son. Starring Kylee Bush, Jill Teed, Sarah Christine Smith.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: The meticulous planning and execution of the United California bank robbery of 1972 is unraveled; stretching from Youngstown to California, the tensions rise, secrets unravel, alliances shift, and FBI investigators start to connect the dots.

programme.title: A Hundred Lies
programme.desc: Ricky is a musician from Toronto, and he needs to support his mother who is in a long-term care home. His co-worker Damian connects him with Reaper, an underground urban music producer, and his career skyrockets; but everything comes for a price. Starring Rob Raco, Dana Abraham, Humberly González.

programme.desc: A couples American Dream in shatters, a killer a little too close to home, and a hitman straight out of a movie.

programme.desc: Joe tries to deal with the fallout from the shock shooting, while deciding whether to put his faith in other passengers; Miller and Hud interrogate Abby.

programme.title: Mom vs. Matchmaker
programme.desc: Maxine is every mothers dream, yet she cant find a faultless man to travel the world with; her mom, Beverley, a financial planner, tells all eligibles she meets about her gorgeous golden egg, but she still hasnt found a secure investment.

programme.title: Shadow Man: William Stephenson and the Art of Political Warfare
programme.desc: A British undercover agent, William Stephenson, is on a secret mission in the USA during the Second World War. He aims to convince Americans to join the war against Hitlers Germany. Starring Eric Davis, Brittany Drisdelle, James Loye.

programme.title: Nightsleeper

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A savvy poker player cleans up at the tables once at sea, but when she witnesses a man overboard, many begin to wonder if it was accidental or on purpose.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A farmer and his wife take a cruise celebrating their hard work and good fortune, but their luck changes drastically and the friends who are on board celebrating with them now aid in the search for the farmer who is now missing at sea.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A tech inventor from Silicon Valley disappears aboard a chartered ship, leaving many wondering what happened to her and if her invention had anything to do with her disappearance.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The murder of Sondra Better in West Palm Beach, Fla., goes on to cast a long shadow of mystery, remaining unsolved for two decades; the case takes a surprising turn in 2018.

programme.title: American Underdog
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Starring Zachary Levi, Anna Paquin, Dennis Quaid.

programme.title: This Place
programme.desc: Two women fall in love for the first time. As they grow closer, each must confront their family histories in unexpected ways while navigating multiple legacies of grief and love. Starring Devery Jacobs, Priya Guns, Janïsa Weekes.

programme.desc: Exploring family relationships, both the loving and the difficult.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - The Weight of Grief
programme.desc: Loss is never easy, but exploring the impact of grief is necessary.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Fading Youth
programme.desc: Exploring how regardless of the situation, the events of ones youth are defining.

programme.title: My Dads a Soccer Mom
programme.desc: Cut from his NFL football team, a man starts bonding with his young daughter (Skai Jackson) and encourages her to play soccer.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Protect Your Family from Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.desc: Every five seconds theres a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert, restore identity, and reimburse lost funds-leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Teaching While Black
programme.desc: When a newly minted PhD finds her Brooklyn neighborhood under siege by urban developers, this hip-hop loving millennial takes the fight straight to the Mid-Western university thats fueling the gentrification movement.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Get Brunched Up!
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Who Put the Chicken in the Pineapple?
programme.desc: Chef Jay twists up the classic American fried rice staple by subbing cauliflower and tossing in tropical flavors like pineapple and fresh vegetables and spices; ginger salad is the perfect compliment to this remix on pineapple fried rice.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Pow, Bang, Wow!
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Lyfes Journey
programme.desc: A family man makes a mistake that changes his life forever. Now he must start a journey to forgiveness that will bring him back to love, family and faith.

programme.title: The Forgettable Life of Liam White
programme.desc: An uninspired novelist begins a journey of self-reflection and reconciliation when he learns that his cancer has returned.
